title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Workshop - Open Intents Framework Overview and Demo
description:
* 🔇 Apologies for the audio issues in the first five minutes *

This workshop by Pepe Blasco (OpenZeppelin, OSS Development Manager) and Francisco Giordano (OpenZeppelin, Smart contract engineer), consists of an initial presentation explaining OIF and some of the outcomes of the edge city event, and then a demo of the OIF flow on testnets with the OIF contracts, solver and aggregator.

Workshop given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
